title: centaurea × mairei
intro: Centaurea × mairei, also known as Knapweed or Lesser Knapweed, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Asteraceae family, native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Centaurea × mairei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Centaurea × mairei is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its benefits.
